title: Album Launch Tour
bodyHtml:
Hear us play The Round Soul of the World LIVE in Wexford, Dublin, Galway and Cork. Details here

A big, big thanks to Craig Carry for our very beautiful screen printed tour poster. A limited number of prints will be available on the tour, and from our shop page
